nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as idea generator replacing own creativity
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer using AI in a more collaborative nature, rather than using AI to come up with my ideas for me

nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or hallucinating source
nodes.grounding_span: Instead of googling a solution, they will ask a chatbot instead, streamlining the troubleshooting process

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: The main time AI makes me feel frustrated is when it hallucinates

nodes.label: Preserving personal creativity
nodes.label_negative: Over-reliance on AI leading to skill atrophy
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to ruin my own creativity by relying on AI and letting my brain go stale

nodes.label: AI as collaborator for iterative refinement
nodes.label_negative: AI use for full writing generation
nodes.grounding_span: I might ask a chatbot how to make an email sound more polite/ more professional

nodes.label: Professional growth and skill maintenance
nodes.grounding_span: I want to continue getting better at what I do

nodes.label: Epistemic accuracy and understanding
nodes.grounding_span: it would just make up paper titles that fit what I was asking for

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer using AI in a more collaborative nature

nodes.label: Frustration with AI hallucination
nodes.grounding_span: The main time AI makes me feel frustrated is when it hallucinates

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for debugging
nodes.grounding_span: Instead of googling a solution, they will ask a chatbot instead, streamlining the troubleshooting process

nodes.label: Negative stance toward AI-generated writing
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer writing papers myself, as I like to have my own writing style

nodes.label: Selective adoption based on task fit
nodes.grounding_span: I don't consult AI for recent internet resources, or anything super niche like very specific scientific information

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: picking out particular key words or phrases that I liked, or taking inspiration from its sentence structure
